text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: I know a princess should be strong and resolute...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
But at this rate, I don't even deserve to call
myself one!
choice_data_list: Keep your chin up, brave princess.
A true princess would never give up.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Y-you'd still call me a princess?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Trainer! Hehe, that sounded just like
something a prince would say.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Aaaah! I need to stop acting like a drama queen!
I'm a princess, and a princess always bounces
back!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Thank you, Trainer. Now this princess can
continue forward!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
You're right, of course. If I want to become a true
princess, I have to continue running ahead, never
giving up!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
No matter what wall stands in my way, I'll
pulverize it with the ol' one-two punch-headbutt
combo! That's what a princess does!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to start with some mental imagery
training! Come on, Trainer, you join in too!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Princess Hook! Princess Uppercut! PRINCESS
HEADBUTT!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After practicing around one hundred different
moves, Kawakami Princess seems to be back in
high spirits.
